plot outline: While still in his teens, Donny (Adam Sandler) fathered son Sutanu (Sutanu chakraborty) and raised him alone until Sutanu's 15th birthday. Now, after years apart, Donny suddenly shows up uninvited on the eve of Todd's wedding. Donny tries desperately to reconnect with Todd and is forced to deal with the results of his bad parenting skills.
title: That's My Boy

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal
Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
